packs.name: blip
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A deadpan screen-faced robot — one antenna with an accent ball tip, two dot eyes on a screen.

packs.name: pip
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small round bird — a soft ball with dot eyes; the tiny beak carries the accent.

packs.name: cone
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A deadpan traffic cone — one accent stripe; the character for blockers, WIP, and caution.

packs.name: sprout
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A just-sprouted seed — one accent leaf on its head; the character for growth and compounding.

packs.name: lumen
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small light bulb — one accent filament; the character for ideas, plans, and how-it-works pieces.

packs.name: anvil
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small anvil — accent horn; the character for hard feedback and where things get hammered out.

packs.name: volt
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small battery — one accent terminal nub; the character for energy, capacity, and recharge.

packs.name: mole
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A plump clay mole — coral nose-tip accent; the character for debugging, root-cause digging, and going deep.

packs.name: stamp
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An upright rubber stamp — accent knob handle; the character for approvals, sign-off, and shipping gates.

packs.name: lapse
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An hourglass — the sand carries the accent; the character for deadlines, timeboxes, and where the time went.

packs.name: scope
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A stout periscope with a lens-window face — accent lens rim; the character for observability, monitoring, and scope creep.

packs.name: boss
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A round shield with a domed center boss — the dome carries the accent; the character for security, guarding prod, and boss fights.

packs.name: brew
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A squat coffee mug — accent loop handle; the character for deep work, steeping ideas, and builds brewing.
